name: Log Aggregation & Summary
description: Collect application logs from multiple services every hour, aggregate error counts by service, and store a summary in the database for dashboard queries.
author: platform

config.sql: INSERT INTO log_summary (service, error_count, hour) SELECT service, error_count, hour::timestamptz FROM json_populate_recordset(null::log_summary_type, '{{nodes.node-3.data.summary}}')
